## Summary

Describe the change and the user or project problem it solves.

## Related work

- Issue:
- ADR:
- Milestone:

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Governance
- [ ] Security or privacy
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Research

## Validation

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] No secrets or personal data were committed
- [ ] Generated claims use approved evidence where applicable
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented
- [ ] Architecture impact was evaluated
- [ ] Accessibility and multilingual impact were considered

## Evidence

Add commands, screenshots, logs or generated artifacts required to review the result.

## Risks and rollback

Describe risks and how the change can be reverted.
